title: Na'vi Questions
objective: Learn to ask and answer questions.

data.text: Now that you've got the hang of some grammer rules, let's move onto questions.
Navi has 2 types of questions: yes/no questions and information questions.

data.description: In Na'vi, yes/no questions are singled with the question marker 'srak'.
An example of a yes/no question. This one means 'Are you well'?
Yes/no questions can be answered with either srane 'yes' or kehe 'no'

data.question: Which of these is a question marker in Na'vi?

data.text: Information questions are formed by either adding pe to the begining or end of a noun.
They are answered with an actual explanation

data.instruction: : someone has just asked you Ngaru lu fpom srak.
data.hint: which question marker is in this question?

data.instruction: : someone has just asked you Nga za'u ftu peseng
data.hint: which question marker is in this question?

data.text: 🎉 You can now ask and answer questions in Na'vi!
